name: REPUBLIC SERVICES, INC.
summary: Republic Services is one of the largest environmental services providers in North America, operating 377 collection operations, 255 transfer stations, 79 recycling centers, 207 active landfills, 24 TSDFs, 5 saltwater disposal wells, 15 deep injection wells, 9 industrial wastewater treatment facilities, and 2 polymer centers across the United States and Canada. The company provides recycling, solid waste collection, transfer, disposal, environmental solutions, and sustainability innovation services, including landfill gas-to-energy projects and plastics circularity programs.
